name: tockTockPayment
description: tockTockPayment schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to the payment. Used internally by Tock.

amount.description: The amount of the reservation that was paid using the paymentType.

payout.description: The Tock-generated payout that includes this payment as a credit to the business bank account. If the business connects to Tock for payment processing using Stripe this field will not be present.

paymentType.description: The form of payment used for this portion of total price on the reservation.

processorId.description: A unique identifier assigned to the payment by the payment processor indicated by the paymentType.

processorFeeCents.description: The amount the payment processor kept from the payment to perform the service.

tockFeeCents.description: The fee that Tock kept from the payment to perform the service.
